user.title: Blockheat entities
user.description: Map external inputs and writable outputs. Legacy helper/boolean mappings are internal-only. Read-only internal state entities use the canonical blockheat_* IDs. On first reload, exact pre-v1 public IDs (binary_sensor.energy_saving_active, sensor.target_saving, sensor.target_comfort, sensor.target_final) are auto-migrated when the canonical target is free; otherwise the old ID remains and manual cleanup is required.

data.control_number_entity: Control output - Writable control number entity

data_description.nordpool_price: Current price sensor with optional `today` attribute for slot ranking.
data_description.storage_room_sensor: Preferred proxy for system energy; use a direct pipe temperature sensor when available, otherwise a storage tank or storage room temperature sensor.
data_description.outdoor_temperature_sensor: Outdoor temperature input used by saving and boost logic.
data_description.control_number_entity: Numeric control endpoint Blockheat writes final target values to.
data_description.pv_sensor: Optional PV power sensor used to suppress blocking when production is high.
data_description.enable_daikin_consumer: Enable optional Daikin consumer writes in tuning and runtime.
data_description.daikin_climate_entity: Target Daikin climate entity for optional consumer writes.

tuning_targets.title: Tuning: Policy & targets
tuning_targets.description: Configure policy window, saving/comfort targets, and cold boost.

data.price_ignore_below: Skip blocking when price is below (SEK/kWh)
data.pv_ignore_above_w: Skip blocking when PV is at/above (W)

data_description.minutes_to_block: Daily total minutes considered expensive and routed to saving mode (top-N 15-minute slots).
data_description.price_ignore_below: If current price is below this value, policy is forced OFF even if the slot is in top-N.
data_description.pv_ignore_above_w: If current PV production is at or above this value, policy is forced OFF even if the slot is in top-N.
data_description.heatpump_setpoint: Base heat pump setpoint used in saving and maintenance modes.
data_description.saving_cold_offset_c: Degrees subtracted from heatpump setpoint when computing saving target.
data_description.energy_saving_warm_shutdown_outdoor: Outdoor temperature threshold where saving target switches to heatpump setpoint.
data_description.comfort_target_c: Desired comfort-room temperature before offsets and boost are applied.
data_description.storage_target_c: Desired storage temperature target before offsets and boost are applied.
data_description.heatpump_offset_c: Degrees subtracted from comfort/storage targets to derive heat pump targets.
data_description.cold_threshold: Outdoor temperature below which cold-weather boost starts applying.
data_description.max_boost: Maximum additional boost degrees that can be added in cold weather.
data_description.enable_forecast_optimization: Rank price slots by true heat cost (price / COP) using per-slot weather forecast temperatures. Falls back to raw price ranking if forecast is unavailable.
data_description.weather_entity: Weather entity providing hourly temperature forecasts for COP-weighted slot ranking.

tuning_daikin.title: Tuning: Daikin consumer
tuning_daikin.description: Set optional Daikin consumer temperatures and outdoor thresholds.

data_description.daikin_normal_temperature: Daikin target temperature when policy is OFF (comfort mode).
data_description.daikin_preheat_offset: Degrees added to normal temperature during very-low-price preheat periods.
data_description.daikin_mild_threshold: Outdoor temperature above which Daikin is turned off (mild weather).
data_description.daikin_cold_threshold: Outdoor temperature below which Daikin switches to capacity-assist mode.
data_description.daikin_disable_threshold: Outdoor temperature below which Daikin is disabled entirely.

error.invalid_required_entities: Required entity id values cannot be empty.
error.invalid_non_negative: Intervals and deltas must be non-negative.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Blockheat config entry is supported.
